title: HOME-44219 — Builder scope of works & quote — Northside Restorations (Michael Harris)
content: Indicative scope of works and quote SOW-NRS-2026-05-06-204 issued by Northside Restorations Pty Ltd (Zava-approved restoration panel, Vic Builders Practitioner #CDB-L 22189). Inspection 2026-05-06 11:00. Affected area: kitchen and adjoining dining (~22 m²). Scope: (1) strip and dispose lower-cabinet carcasses and kickboards (water-logged, swelling >5mm) — supply and install replacement matched flat-pack carcasses with existing benchtop reused — AUD 6,200; (2) lift and dispose engineered timber flooring across kitchen and dining (delamination confirmed) — supply and install matched 14mm engineered oak with acoustic underlay — AUD 7,800; (3) sub-floor drying / dehumidification programme over 7 days with daily moisture readings and certificate at completion (covered under H4.2) — AUD 1,400; (4) detach / refit dishwasher (water-damaged, replacement under contents H3.1) — AUD 220; (5) repaint kitchen cornices and skirting affected by splash — AUD 480; (6) site protection, dust containment and waste removal — AUD 380. TOTAL ex-GST AUD 16,480. GST AUD 1,648. TOTAL AUD 18,128. Estimated programme 11 working days from authorisation. Habitability: kitchen unusable during works; temporary accommodation under H1.7 may be required for ~5 days during cabinet/flooring install. Customer cooking on a camping stove in the interim. This quote satisfies the policy's evidence requirement of a builder scope of works for repairs greater than AUD 3,000.
